info.description: Backend APIs for Indian Master Application - A comprehensive platform for job seekers and hirers in India
info.title: Indian Master API

put.description: Update the status of a job application. Notifies the worker of the status change.

get.description: Retrieve paginated audit logs with optional filters
Retrieve system health status
Retrieve paginated user activities with optional filters

post.description: Approve a pending verification request. Notifies the worker/business owner.
Reject a pending verification request. Notifies the worker/business owner with the reason.
Submit a job application. Notifies the hirer and invalidates recommendation cache.

get.description: Retrieve all applications submitted by the authenticated worker with pagination

post.description: Initiate the login/signup flow by sending a 6-digit OTP to the provided mobile number.
Verify the 6-digit OTP. If the user doesn't exist, a new account will be created with the provided role and language.

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of businesses filtered by business type

200.description: Businesses retrieved successfully with pagination metadata

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of all active businesses

200.description: Active businesses retrieved successfully with pagination metadata

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of businesses owned by a specific user

200.description: Businesses retrieved successfully with pagination metadata

post.description: Get an existing chat thread or create a new one between worker and hirer

200.description: Chat thread retrieved or created successfully

get.description: Retrieve paginated messages from a chat thread

post.description: Send a message in a chat thread

401.description: Unauthorized - user not found in context

post.description: Create a new job posting. Invalidates jobs feed cache and notifies matching workers.

put.description: Update an existing job posting. Invalidates jobs feed, search, and recommendation caches.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated feed of available jobs. Results are cached in Redis for 5 minutes.

post.description: Perform advanced search on jobs with multiple filters

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific job
Retrieve paginated notifications for the authenticated user (all, read + unread)
Retrieve paginated unread notifications for the authenticated user
Get the count of unread notifications for the authenticated user

patch.description: Mark a specific notification as read for the authenticated user

500.description: Failed to mark notification as read

post.description: Perform advanced search on jobs with multiple filters. Results are cached in Redis for 5 minutes.
Perform advanced search on workers with multiple filters. Results are cached in Redis for 5 minutes.
Create a new subscription plan for the authenticated user

401.description: Unauthorized - user not found in context

get.description: Retrieve the active subscription for the authenticated user

401.description: Unauthorized - user not found in context

get.description: Check if the user has available contacts for their subscription plan

401.description: Unauthorized - user not found in context

402.description: Active subscription required to check contact limits

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of users filtered by role

200.description: Users retrieved successfully with pagination metadata

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of all active users

200.description: Active users retrieved successfully with pagination metadata

get.description: Retrieve the worker profile for the authenticated user (Worker Only)

put.description: Update an existing worker profile. Invalidates Redis cache for recommendations and search.

post.description: Create a new worker profile for the authenticated user (Worker Only)

get.description: Retrieve the verification status for a worker (Worker Only)
Retrieve the verification status for a worker (Worker Only)
Retrieve job recommendations for a worker based on matching criteria. Results are cached in Redis for 5 minutes.

post.description: Perform advanced search on workers with multiple filters

get.description: Retrieve job recommendations for a worker based on matching criteria
